AM-ErrorResponse.name: AM-ErrorResponse
AM-ErrorResponse.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage name="AM-ErrorResponse">
    <Set>
        <Payload contentType="application/json"><![CDATA[{
  "error": true,
  "fault_name": "{fault.name}",
  "fault_type": "{fault.type}",
  "message": "Failed to create KVM",
  "response_status": "{kvm.create.response.status.code}",
  "response_content": "{kvm.create.response.content}"
}]]></Payload>
    </Set>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="response"/>
</AssignMessage>

AM-SetResponse.name: AM-SetResponse
AM-SetResponse.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage name="AM-SetResponse">
    <Set>
        <Payload contentType="application/json">{kvm.response.body}</Payload>
        <Headers>
            <Header name="Content-Type">application/json</Header>
        </Headers>
    </Set>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="response"/>
</AssignMessage>

JS-CreateAuthHeader.name: JS-CreateAuthHeader
JS-CreateAuthHeader.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" name="JS-CreateAuthHeader">
    <DisplayName>JS-CreateAuthHeader</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://createAuthHeader.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>

KVM-GetCredentials.name: KVM-GetCredentials
KVM-GetCredentials.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<KeyValueMapOperations name="KVM-GetCredentials" mapIdentifier="devops-credentials">
    <ExpiryTimeInSecs>86400</ExpiryTimeInSecs>
    <Get assignTo="private.username">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>username</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
    <Get assignTo="private.password">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>password</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
</KeyValueMapOperations>
